# Redesign lists on stevehocking.co.uk

## What

I want to update the look of lists on stevehocking.co.uk. The current lists look out of place in the current web landscape.

## Requirements

* Width <428px - Tile image above with title, tagline, date and categories below 
* Width <1024px - Single column, tile image to left, to right title, tagline, date and categories
* Width >1024px - Multiple columns as <1024px to a maximum of 3
